name: @tank/nextjs-caching-guide
description: Deep guide to Next.js App Router caching layers, revalidation strategies, use cache directive, fetch cache options, static vs dynamic rendering, ISR, cache debugging, and version-specific behavior changes. Triggers: next.js caching, revalidatePath, revalidateTag, ISR, stale data, use cache, unstable_cache, cache busting, data cache, router cache, full route cache, force-dynamic, cacheLife, cacheTag.
